data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Failure handling if one source declines', but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for failure handling, yet there is no evidence provided that explicitly demonstrates how the system handles a scenario where one of the payment sources declines. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of failure handling if one source declines.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
